issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.
The skill file contains verbose explanations that could be more concise.
Uses curl to download and execute a script from bun.sh without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: bundle-ts-browser-minify-sourcemap
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most of the rubric but omits the NODE_ENV definition, while Response B uses a different build tool and misses all required bun options.

scenarios.name: create-bun-serve-json-server
scenarios.rationale: Both responses miss the required 500 error handler and the exact JSON payload; A uses Response.json and logs the correct URL format, making it slightly better.
